query: SELECT lu.id, lu.titulo, lu.categoria_id, lc.nome as categoria_nome FROM links_uteis lu LEFT JOIN links_categorias lc ON lu.categoria_id = lc.id ORDER BY lu.ordem;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user EgejHXbrcjh3Be8.6752ad3ffc44 --database KrCJog4rXRpMzt9GiEysge --execute SELECT lu.id, lu.titulo, lu.categoria_id, lc.nome as categoria_nome FROM links_uteis lu LEFT JOIN links_categorias lc ON lu.categoria_id = lc.id ORDER BY lu.ordem;
